title: Open Recommendations — v1.0.0 Wrapper
description: Versioned wrapper for legacy recommendations.json schema 1.0.0. Closes at wrapper scope (rejects decline_count and any unknown root field) AND per-property: metadata is wrapped with allOf + unevaluatedProperties: false (rejects metadata.extra), recommendations items wrapped the same. Frozen post-bump — no further modifications. Mirrors profile.schema.v1.1.0.json's per-property closure pattern.
